data.description: JPMorgan reduces MasTec Inc target price from $386 to $346.
Taiwan equities hit a fresh record as the benchmark index climbs 1.1% to 37,135.550.
Malaysia seeks phosphate and other mineral imports from Australia, according to PM.
Australian PM says new diesel supply of 100 million litres has been secured from Brunei and South Korea shipments.

data.title: Klook Expands Its Experiences Offering to Include Sports & Live Events, Unveiling a Blockbuster Line-Up Across Four of the World's Biggest Properties
data.description: Klook, a well-known experiences platform in Asia Pacific, has introduced new packages for major sporting events in 2026 such as the World Cup, Roland-Garros, Wimbledon, and Formula 1™. On April 16, 2026, it was revealed that these packages are now accessible to customers. This development signifies Klook's expansion into the realm of sports and live events.
Malaysia says Petronas will give priority to Australia after domestic requirements are satisfied, according to PM.

data.title: Orthocell Secures Approval to sell Remplir™ to the U.S. Department of Defence Hospital Network
data.description: Orthocell has been granted approval for their product Remplir™ to be utilized in the widespread networks of the United States Department of Defence (DoD) and Veterans Affairs (VA) hospitals. This includes 51 DoD military hospitals and 170 Veterans Affairs (VA) medical centres. On a related note, Orthocell has previously locked in contracts with 32 Value...

data.title: CORRECTING and REPLACING Panmnesia to Mass-Produce PCIe 6.4-CXL 3.2 Fusion Switch
data.description: PANMNESIA, a South Korean fabless company led by CEO Myoungsoo Jung, is set to mass-produce the world's only ASIC switch chip capable of PCIe 6.4-CXL 3.2 fusion. This chip features Port-Based Routing (PBR) and full CXL 3.2 standard compliance. Panmnesia specializes in developing link solutions for AI infrastructure and aims to leverage this technology to meet market demands. This advancement signifies a major milestone in the industry, consolidating Panmnesia's positioning as a key player.
Australia confident about delivering on existing contracts with Malaysia, according to PM.

data.title: transcosmos wins Salesforce Japan Partner of the Year - Innovation -
data.description: transcosmos has been honored as the Japan Partner of the Year for Innovation at the Salesforce Japan Partner Award 2026, held on April 16, 2026, in Tokyo. The company's excellence within the Salesforce ecosystem was highlighted, particularly for its outstanding support of Kanagawa. This prestigious award signifies transcosmos' significant contribution to the industry and underscores its commitment to innovation.

data.title: BitMEX suggests a 'canary fund' as an alternative to shield against a Bitcoin quantum coin freeze to minimize disruption.
data.description: According to BitMEX, efforts should be made to minimize the impact of the freeze, even if it means introducing more complexity.

data.title: Bitcoin faces resistance after reaching $76K peak, as per CryptoQuant. Movement of large amounts to exchanges noted.
data.description: According to analytics firm CryptoQuant, Bitcoin may be approaching a short-term peak following its rise to a multi-month high of $76,000 on Wednesday. The data suggests that investors are transferring large amounts of Bitcoin to exchanges, indicating a possible cooling off period for the cryptocurrency.
Australia announces partnership with Malaysia on halal meat trade to expand exports and ensure food supply stability.
Malaysia PM says talks with Petronas focused on arrangements for mutual benefit.
Ukrainian authorities say six were killed in Odesa following Russian overnight aerial attacks.
European Banking Authority head says private credit is not a systemic issue for the region’s banks.

data.title: Verizon to Power Unforgettable Fan Experiences at the FIFA World Cup 2026™
data.description: Verizon's 5G technology, Fixed Wireless Access, and Broadcast Solutions are set to be employed by FIFA for enhancing soccer innovation and delivering immersive experiences at the largest global sporting event. This collaboration aims to leverage Verizon's cutting-edge technology to elevate the fan experience and drive innovation in soccer. The partnership will showcase the potential of 5G in sports, enhancing connectivity and enabling new ways for fans to engage with the game. This initiative will impact millions of viewers and attendees worldwide, offering them unparalleled access and entertainment during the event.
European Banking Authority head highlights cybersecurity risk assessment for banks as a key focus area.
European Banking Authority head says safeguards are needed for multi-issuance stablecoins to protect the EU from risks linked to non-EU redemptions.
European Banking Authority head says banks remain strong and resilient to ongoing shocks.
